CREATE TABLE file_sizes (id INT, size_bytes INT);
SELECT id, formatReadableSize(size_bytes) AS formatted_size FROM file_sizes;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN size_bytes = 0 THEN '0 B' ELSE formatReadableSize(size_bytes) END AS formatted_size FROM file_sizes;
SELECT id, formatReadableSize(size_bytes) AS formatted_size FROM (SELECT size_bytes FROM file_sizes WHERE size_bytes > 0);
SELECT id, formatReadableSize(size_bytes) AS formatted_size FROM file_sizes WHERE size_bytes IN (SELECT size_bytes FROM file_sizes WHERE size_bytes < 1073741824);
SELECT t1.id, formatReadableSize(t1.size_bytes) AS formatted_size FROM (SELECT id, size_bytes FROM file_sizes) AS t1;
SELECT arrayJoin([1, 1024, 1048576, 192851925]) AS filesize_bytes, formatReadableSize(filesize_bytes) AS filesize;

SELECT t1.id, formatReadableSize(t1.size_bytes + t2.size_bytes) AS total_size FROM (SELECT id, size_bytes FROM file_sizes) AS t1 JOIN (SELECT id, 1024 AS size_bytes FROM file_sizes LIMIT 1) AS t2 ON t1.id = 1;
WITH (SELECT AVG(size_bytes) FROM file_sizes) AS avg_size SELECT formatReadableSize(avg_size) AS average_size;
